response.original_title: How Do I Withdraw Money from Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Withdrawing money from Robinhood is simple once your funds are available (: 1-863-338-2360) You can transfer cash from your Robinhood account to your linked bank account (: 1-863-338-2360) Make sure your bank account is verified before starting the withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360) Steps to Withdraw Money to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360) Open the Robinhood app and log in to your account (: 1-863-338-2360) Tap on the Account icon at the bottom right (: 1-863-338-2360) Select Transfers or Transfer to Your Bank (: 1-863-338-2360) Enter the amount you want to withdraw (: 1-863-338-2360) Choose your linked bank account (: 1-863-338-2360) Review the details and confirm the withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360) Check If Your Funds Are Available (: 1-863-338-2360) You can only withdraw settled fu
